ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility (e.g., city, state) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., juvenile detention center, correctional institution) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the facility */,
  "administrator_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility administrator */,
  "administrator_email" TEXT /* Email of the facility administrator */,
  "data_collection_team" TEXT /* Contact information for the data collection team */,
  "data_collection_methodology" TEXT /* Description of the facility's data collection methodology and protocols */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strata" (
  "stratum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stratum */,
  "stratum_name" TEXT /* Name of the stratum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stratum (e.g., geographic region, demographic group) */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the stratum */,
  "facility_count" INTEGER /* Number of facilities within the stratum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stratum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "stratum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stratum where the data was collected */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the data was collected */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the juvenile offender */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the juvenile offender */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity of the juvenile offender */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the juvenile offender */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the juvenile offender */,
  "living_with_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the living situation of the juvenile offender */,
  "family_time_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family time spent by the juvenile offender */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the juvenile offender */,
  "family_structure" TEXT /* Family structure of the juvenile offender */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the juvenile offender */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the juvenile offender */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the juvenile offender */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Language spoken by the juvenile offender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_living_with_id FOREIGN KEY ("living_with_id") REFERENCES living_situations ("living_with_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_family_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_time_id") REFERENCES family_times ("family_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_stratum_id FOREIGN KEY ("stratum_id") REFERENCES strata ("stratum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "living_situations" (
  "living_with_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each living situation */,
  "living_with_name" TEXT /* Name of the living situation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("living_with_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_times" (
  "family_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family time category */,
  "family_time_name" TEXT /* Name of the family time category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criminal_histories" (
  "criminal_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criminal history record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of crime committed */,
  "offense_date" TEXT /* Date of the offense */,
  "conviction_date" TEXT /* Date of conviction */,
  "sentence_length" INTEGER /* Length of sentence in months */,
  "prior_offenses" INTEGER /* Number of prior offenses */,
  "prior_convictions" INTEGER /* Number of prior convictions */,
  "correctional_institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the correctional institution */,
  "treatment_programs" TEXT /* Treatment programs received by the juvenile */,
  "treatment_services" TEXT /* Treatment services received by the juvenile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criminal_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criminal_histories_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criminal_histories_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criminal_histories_correctional_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("correctional_institution_id") REFERENCES correctional_institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correctional_institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correctional institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the correctional institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the correctional institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the institution */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the institution */,
  "administrator_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution administrator */,
  "administrator_email" TEXT /* Email of the institution administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substance_use" (
  "substance_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance use record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record */,
  "use_weapon" INTEGER /* Indicator if the juvenile has ever used a weapon */,
  "alcohol_use" INTEGER /* Indicator if the juvenile has ever used alcohol */,
  "drug_use" INTEGER /* Indicator if the juvenile has ever used drugs */,
  "substance_type" TEXT /* Type of substance used */,
  "frequency_of_use" TEXT /* Frequency of substance use */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the substance use data (e.g., self-reported, urine test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_use_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "activity_logs" TEXT /* Activity logs of the user (e.g., login history, data accessed) */,
  "training_certification" TEXT /* Training and certification status of the user (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Data accessed by the user (e.g., demographic information, criminal history) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., IP address, city) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user (e.g., desktop, laptop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record being tracked */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Changes made to the data in this version (e.g., updated fields, new data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record being linked */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the external data (e.g., public health records, educational data) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being stored (e.g., medical history, academic performance) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the external data being stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)
